_comment: Ranked-tier registry of repos with discovered latent value. Append-only; promotion follows discovery.

ranked.thesis: Live 122-test FastAPI portal; estate's community-facing read API + personalization surface. Highest value: /api/manifest + adaptive-syllabus as the self-describing ORGAN-VI gateway. See DISCOVERY.md.
ranked.first_task: Wire /api/manifest into the ORGAN-IV orchestration registry and add a CI step that publishes data/api-routes.json + data/community-stats.json via community-data-export.
